description_long: This object is a colorful, hexagonal cardboard display box designed for a Furby stuffed toy. The box features a prominent purple and orange color scheme with playful graphics and branding, including the Furby logo and images of the toy on the sides. The front and top are open, allowing clear visibility and access to the interior, which is currently empty. The back of the box displays product information and a large image of the Furby character. The structure is lightweight, with thin cardboard walls and a reinforced base and top for stability. The overall appearance is vibrant and inviting, intended to attract attention in a retail or urban environment.
description: A hexagonal, purple and orange Furby display box with open front and top, featuring playful branding and graphics.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open display area, purple top, and Furby branding along the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the orange side panel with Furby graphics and partial view of the open front.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying product information and a large Furby image on a purple background.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with orange panel, Furby graphics, and clear view of the open display area.
attribute_facial_expression: No facial expression is visible as the box is empty and does not contain the stuffed toy.
attribute_pose_or_posture: No pose or posture is visible as the box is empty and does not contain the stuffed toy.
